CONTENT.Career: On 18 December 2020, Vanderson signed a 4-year contract with Grêmio. He made his professional debut with the club in a 2–1 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A win over Atlético Goianiense on 28 December 2020.On 1 January 2022, Vanderson signed for Ligue 1 club Monaco on a contract until June 2027. The transfer fee paid to Grêmio was reportedly €11 million.
CONTENT.Honours: GrêmioCopa do Brasil runner-up: 2020Campeonato Gaúcho: 2021Recopa Gaúcha: 2021

SUMMARY: Vanderson de Oliveira Campos (born 21 June 2001), simply known as Vanderson, is a Brazilian professional footballer who plays as a right-back or right wing-back for Ligue 1 club Monaco and the Brazil national team.
